name: Anna Wintour
subject: An invitation for Peter
body:
I'll be holding a special grassroots discussion with Dr. Jill Biden -- and making a special announcement |
---

| [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1e3/1cd0ac28/159316f4d/3570209a/4060589793/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/rsvp-to-anna-wintour-discussion?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
Peter --

I was proud to endorse Joe Biden as a man of character, who demonstrates decency, honor, compassion, trustworthiness, and best of all _experience_. And I was thrilled when he chose Kamala Harris as his running mate.

I've also watched President Trump's response to the pandemic in horror -- he's encouraged people to drink disinfectant, refused to take any responsibility, and let more than 180,000 Americans die.

These months have been a reminder -- as if we needed a reminder -- that America must choose a new president. That's why I'm doing my part to make sure we defeat Donald Trump and elect Joe and Kamala, and Democrats down the ballot in November.

**And it's why I'll be holding a special grassroots discussion with Dr. Jill Biden -- and making a special announcement -- on Wednesday, September 9 at 6 p.m. eastern.**

We'll also have a few special guests, some of my personal friends and fantastic American designers, joining us. It will be an event filled with great conversation and exciting announcements, so you won't want to miss it.

[Peter, you don't even have to donate to attend this event, but I do hope you will consider contributing. Just click this link to RSVP, and Joe's team will send you the details about how to join me, Dr. Biden, and our special guests on September 9.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1e3/1cd0ac28/159316f4d/3570209a/4060589793/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/rsvp-to-anna-wintour-discussion?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
[RSVP to the grassroots fundraiser ≫](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1e3/1cd0ac28/159316f4d/3570209a/4060589793/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/rsvp-to-anna-wintour-discussion?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
We all have to do our part in this final stretch of the campaign, Peter. In just two months, we'll find out whether America has chosen a new president who can get us through this pandemic and begin to build us back better than we were before.

I'm doing everything I can right now to make sure I don't wake up on November 4th with any regrets, and I hope you are too, Peter.

If you're ready to elect a president and Democrats across the country who can govern, who understand how to get results out of Congress, who can set this country on a path to sustainability -- and who put the well-being of others before their own -- it's time to get to work.

[Will you reserve your ticket for my special grassroots event and conversation with Dr. Biden on September 9 at 6 p.m.? I'll also be making a special announcement, so please join us by submitting your email and the Biden Victory Fund will follow up with your link to join the event:](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1e3/1cd0ac28/159316f4d/3570209a/4060589793/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/rsvp-to-anna-wintour-discussion?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

[https://go.joebiden.com/Anna-Wintour-Discussion](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1e3/1cd0ac28/159316f4d/3570209a/4060589793/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/rsvp-to-anna-wintour-discussion?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

See you soon,

Anna Wintour

_Anna Wintour has held the position as editor-in-chief of US Vogue since July 1988. She was named US Artistic Director of Cond e Nast in March 2013 and most recently, she was appointed global content advisor of Conde Nast in August of 2019._
[DONATE](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1e3/1cd0ac28/159316f4d/35702098/4060589793/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1e3/1cd0ac28/159316f4d/35702097/4060589793/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1e3/1cd0ac28/159316f4d/35702096/4060589793/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1e3/1cd0ac28/159316f4d/35702095/4060589793/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1e3/1cd0ac28/159316f4d/35702094/4060589793/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1e3/1cd0ac28/159316f4d/35702093/4060589793/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1e3/1cd0ac28/159316f4d/35702092/4060589793/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1e3/1cd0ac28/159316f4d/35702093/4060589793/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Biden Victory Fund accepts contributions of up to $721,300 from a person and $345,000 from a multicandidate committee ("PAC"). The first $2,800/$5,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to Biden for President. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $210,000/$105,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, AR, CT, DC, HI, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, OK, OR, RI, SC, TN, UT, WA, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

Our unstoppable coalition has defied the odds and brought new ideas and new energy to our part of Texas. We’re within inches of replacing an ineffective, inaccessible eight-term career politician ― and his backwards ideas about who the government should be fighting for. We’re just 59 days from making that happen, team. That means we need all hands on deck to be able to finish out this fight. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for your support, friends. With you on my side, we’re on course to make history. Mike Siegel | | If you'd like to support Mike Siegel for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, click . | Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress Mike Siegel for Congress PO Box 2409 Austin, Texas 78701 United States mailto:siegel@siegelfortexas.org

As you may have seen on Scott's Facebook, we are knocking doors! We invite you to join us in talking with key voters in the community.

Thanks to you, we are well underway in our enthusiastic and productive campaign. That being said: we have just 60 days to go.

8 short weeks until we show up to the polls to cast our vote for Scott \- to cast our vote to preserve American values and to vote for effective leadership.

We ask you now...can you join us?

name: Mary Mancini
subject: Candidate Couch, Happy #901 Day, Joe in Keno(sha), & Vote Early During Early Voting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Newsletter%20Header%20%281%29.png]
Dear Peter,
For almost a decade, Tennessee Republicans have wielded unchecked power in Tennessee. But this year, Tennessee Democrats are terrifying the opposition with a slate of amazing candidates who are running to take power back and bring some much-needed balance to our government.
Why are Republicans so nervous and scrambling to protect their stranglehold on the State? Because we have formidable candidates like Virginia Couch—our Democratic candidate for HD18—and all they have are political flip-floppers and far right extremists.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/virginia%20couch.jpg]
In the next session of the state legislature, we need leaders who have firsthand experience navigating an economy devastated by COVID-19. Virginia is a scrappy small business owner who invested in a company during the depths of the Great Recession and transformed it into a thriving business. And now she's guiding her company through these difficult economic times.
Virginia will use her private sector experience to get Knox County growing again. She will promote small business initiatives, including increasing access to affordable financing for women and minority-owned businesses. She'll attract high-value industries such as advanced manufacturing to the state. And, because she recognizes that improving the financial lives of working men and women increases their ability to have a better life for themselves and their families, she'll work to establish a state minimum wage.
We get why the GOP is panicking right now. We would be, too, if we had to campaign against candidates like Virginia. She, along with our slate of strong women candidates [https://tndp.org/2020-democratic-candidates/] - led by Marquita Bradshaw at the top of the ticket [https://www.marquitabradshaw.com] - are going to give Tennessee Republicans a run for their money.
Election day is November 3rd and early voting starts October 14th. It's up to you to help change things so remember to mask up and make a plan to VOTE EARLY DURING EARLY VOTING .
See you at the polls,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
PS - Virginia is asking you to join her in this campaign. Whether it's your time, energy, or resources, all are essential to make sure she wins in District 18. Join her campaign now. [https://www.votevirginiacouch.com/]
TOUGH MOTHER JERRI GREEN
https://www.facebook.com/JerriGreenFor83/posts/315764289871230 [https://www.facebook.com/JerriGreenFor83/posts/315764289871230]
This Tuesday, the most southwestern part of the state celebrated 901 Day. The home of the Blues, the grittiest basketball team, and world-class barbecue, Memphis' cultural significance on this state and country cannot be overstated. By recommitting our support to good leaders like Jerri Green, we celebrated the hope of Memphis’ future and commemorated its past. Watch Jerri's 901 Day video. [https://www.facebook.com/JerriGreenFor83/posts/315764289871230]
Also check out the other Tennessee Democrats running to represent Shelby, Tennessee's largest county, in the state house:
District 84: Joe Towns [https://www.facebook.com/reelectjoetowns/timeline?lst=611470081%3A100001446157043%3A1592769202]
District 85: Jesse Chism [https://www.facebook.com/votejessechism85/]
District 86: Barbara Cooper [http://vote4bcooper.com/]
District 87: Karen Camper [https://www.facebook.com/KarenDCamper/]
District 88: Larry Miller [http://www.capitol.tn.gov/house/members/h88.html]
District 90: Torrey Harris [https://www.torreyharris.com/]
District 91: London Lamar [https://www.londonlamar.com/]
District 93: G.A Hardaway [https://www.facebook.com/State-Representative-GA-Hardaway-Sr-99405974190/]
District 95: Lynette Williams [https://www.facebook.com/DrLynnetteWilliams/]
District 96: Dwayne Thompson [https://www.votethompson96.com/]
District 97: Gabby Salinas [http://voteforgabby.com/]
District 98: Antonio Parkinson [http://tnrepparkinson.com/]
TENNESSEE COLLEGE DEMOCRATICS
ANNUAL CONVENTION
www.mobilize.us/tennesseecollegedemocrats/event/312353/ [www.mobilize.us/tennesseecollegedemocrats/event/312353/]
The Tennessee College Dems are hosting their Annual Convention on Sept [http://www.mobilize.us/tennesseecollegedemocrats/event/312353/] ember 19 via Zoom [http://www.mobilize.us/tennesseecollegedemocrats/event/312353/] . Speakers will include Rep. Charles Booker, Heidi Campbell, Keely Sage, Alix Thornhill, and end with a yoga session led by Joan Barker.
JOE BIDEN GOES TO KENOSHA
Joe Biden went to Kenosha to comfort the family of Jacob Blake, yet another Black American victim of excessive force by a police officer. He grieved with them and listened to their concerns. Joe Biden understands grief, understands pain. And when he sees it, he seeks to heal it. He drew on his faith in delivering a moving speech at the Grace Lutheran Church in Kenosha.
In a statement, Ben Crump, the attorney representing Jacob Blake, said "the family was grateful for the meeting and was very impressed that the Bidens were so engaged and willing to really listen."
Trump’s visit to Kenosha was a political stunt that was all about him. He didn’t meet with protestors, civil rights activists, or the Blake family - or even mention Jacob Blake’s name - and refused to acknowledge the issues of systemic racism and police violence.
Unlike Trump, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris will not only listen but will deliver for the Blake family and so many others affected by systemic racism by working to heal this divided nation, and confront the systemic racism that is at the root of police brutality and too many fatal shootings [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MHVU3x9iKBs] .
TWEETS OF THE WEEK
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-09-03%20at%204.50.25%20PM.png]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-09-03%20at%204.50.56%20PM.png]
MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE EARLY DURING
EARLY VOTING
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Early%20Voting%20Donkey600w.png]
Early voting is easy, safe and quick and the best solution to avoid crowded polling locations and Covid-19 risks. Make your plan to wear a mask, go during non-peak hours if possible, and maintain social distancing.
Early voting times and locations differ in each county. Check your county election commission for all times and locations.
TNDP THREE STAR CELEBRATION
COMING SOON
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Three%20Star%20Logo%20600w.png]
Later this month, the Tennessee Democratic Party will hold our largest fundraiser of the year - virtually, of course - to help us continue our work to elect more Democrats in the state. The name of the event, the Three Star Celebration, is based on Tennessee’s Tri-Star flag, and every year a theme is assigned to each of three stars. In 2020:

- The first star represents the 100th anniversary of the ratification of the 19th amendment (Tennessee was the 36th state to vote yes and has been known since then as ‘The Perfect 36’.)
- The second star represents the 60th anniversary of the Nashville sit-ins and desegregation of downtown lunch counters.
- The third star celebrates our future and we will feature the Democratic candidates and local elected officials who represent the diversity of Tennessee and the future of our great state.

Tickets on sale soon!
CHIP IN TO TURN OUT THE VOTE
In 2018 Tennessee Democratic voter turnout increased in all 95 counties - in some places as much as 25%. With the right investment and messaging strategy we know we can flip seats in November. Targeted media will help mobilize Democrats to vote, vote early, and vote safely - but we need help covering costs.
We’ve already assembled an amazing team to help us Get Out The Vote and support our diverse and talented roster of candidates. Now we need to focus on voter turnout. Targeted messaging and media are more critical than ever because of COVID-19. The GOP thinks that they have Tennessee on lock but we’re going to prove them wrong.
Will you make a donation right now, and help us pay for the media strategy needed to flip these crucial seats? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: An update from the campaign trail
body:
Over the past two weeks, I have been out on the campaign trail on a Park Tour. | | |
# An update from the campaign trail
---
| | Over the past two weeks, I have been out on the campaign trail on a **Park Tour**. My campaign is committed to public health, public safety, and finding creative ways to meet as many voters as possible. That is why we are meeting voters in open-air, public parks all throughout the district with masks and social distancing.

If you weren't able to make it to any of the events so far, don't worry - **we still have 30 more parks scheduled**. Check our our [Facebook](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=92f729e6c0&e=140a9b81e7) and [website](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=0f47e28a78&e=140a9b81e7) for more info.

I am so happy to finally be out campaigning again. I love interacting with voters and personally spreading our message across the 16th. But it takes time and money to make our way all across this big district.

[Can you chip in today to keep us going and help fund our park tour?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=55f1636bf2&e=140a9b81e7)
**
**
---
| Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---
| | | | | | | [](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=392ea43846&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani for Illinois

name: MJ Hegar News Alert
subject: MSNBC: MJ has a “very solid chance” of flipping Texas 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f85/7f51f7bc/42319526/4efacf6d/1517601459/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f85/7f51f7bc/42319526/4efacf6c/1517601459/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200905.1nd__2039__&amount=10")
---
Peter, MSNBC just reported that MJ can win in November... but that's not all!

They went on to say that, "John Cornyn has two big problems facing his re-election campaign -- one of which is MJ Hegar, the other is a poll showing **John Cornyn below 50 percent, which is always a dangerous indicator for incumbents."**

All the signs point to this race being one of the closest of 2020. Sen. Cornyn and his DC bosses are terrified that he'll lose and that Texas will flip for MJ. They've been pouring money into his campaign for months now, and **[we need your help to continue building the grassroots movement to defeat them!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f85/7f51f7bc/42319526/4efacf6c/1517601459/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200905.1nd__2039__&amount=10")**

Our grassroots army is already over 150,000 strong, but winning this race will truly take all of us.

**Can we count on you to pitch in?**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f85/7f51f7bc/42319526/4efacf63/1517601459/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200905.1nd__2039__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f85/7f51f7bc/42319526/4efacf62/1517601459/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200905.1nd__2039__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f85/7f51f7bc/42319526/4efacf61/1517601459/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200905.1nd__2039__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f85/7f51f7bc/42319526/4efacf60/1517601459/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200905.1nd__2039__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f85/7f51f7bc/42319526/4efacf67/1517601459/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200905.1nd__2039__")**
\-- Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f85/7f51f7bc/42319526/4efacf6c/1517601459/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200905.1nd__2039__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f85/7f51f7bc/42319526/4efacf66/1517601459/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2039&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f85/7f51f7bc/42319526/4efacf65/1517601459/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Genevieve=20Collins?=
subject: Weekly wrap-up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,
Another big week on the campaign trail is in the books, and we're officially under 60 days until the election!

[](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=15dda87c89&e=68aaeb0998)That means we're pounding the pavement (with appropriate social distancing, of course) and making calls on a daily basis, in order to reach as many voters as possible before Early Voting starts.

**We are still recruiting interns and volunteers** , so if you would like to join our team, [please click here](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=751d2a8e22&e=68aaeb0998). We'd love to have your help!
---
|
---
| As you may have heard, my opponent, Colin Allred, went up with a TV ad this week touting **his nonexistent bipartisan record.**

**It's simply impossible to qualify as "bipartisan" if you vote with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time and AOC 93% of the time**. Apparently Twitter agrees with me, because my tweet on the subject went just a bit viral.

**The truth still matters** , and the fact is, **my opponent does not work with both parties, and not a single bill he has introduced has become law**. His record of failure speaks for itself.
---
|
---
| [](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=63375c46a6&e=68aaeb0998)Finally, I was really excited to have the opportunity to work with Dan Crenshaw and five other amazing Texas candidates on a new project called "Texas Reloaded."

We'll be releasing the full video soon, but for now, enjoy [this little snippet](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=8b60697725&e=68aaeb0998). Spoiler alert: you might catch a peek of my sweet jiu jitsu moves.

You can check out the trailer [here](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=8fdc5e266d&e=68aaeb0998), or by clicking on the image to the left.
---
|
---
| We've got **a jam-packed 59 days until Election Day **in the 32nd Congressional District. **Our campaign has geared up to take on Colin Allred** and his Nancy Pelosi money, and we are in a great position to win. However, [we can always use additional support](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=681aba5b19&e=68aaeb0998) to help get our message out. Any amount helps!

I hope you have a great Labor Day weekend! I look forward to updating you with everything that happens in the coming week!

Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32
---

You can check out the trailer , or by clicking on the image to the left. | | We've got a jam-packed 59 days until Election Day in the 32nd Congressional District. Our campaign has geared up to take on Colin Allred and his Nancy Pelosi money, and we are in a great position to win. However, to help get our message out. Any amount helps! I hope you have a great Labor Day weekend! I look forward to updating you with everything that happens in the coming week! Thank you and God bless, | | Genevieve Collins Republican Nominee Texas Congressional District 32 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "CONTRIBUTE" | | | | PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC | | Copyright © 2020 COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC., All rights reserved.

name: Corky Messner
subject: Can you lend a hand?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Click or Tap for more info >>
Peter,

We're in the final stretch to the Primary Election on Tuesday, and I wanted to check in and make sure you saw the email my team sent the other day about volunteering.

_We need to win BIG on Tuesday, and in order to do that we need to have a strong showing from all of my supporters_. **Are you able to lend a hand and join our Grassroots Victory Team?**

We still need people to make phone calls ahead of the election to spread my campaign's conservative message across New Hampshire. And Tuesday, we need dedicated supporters to work at the polls on Election Day to engage with more potential supporters.

Having a strong grassroots team is paramount to winning a race that's this important for our state's future, and I'm thankful for all the support you've shown so far.

If you're able to help, please email my Field Director, _**[Ryan Nichols (Ryan@CorkyForSenate.com)](mailto:ryan@corkyforsenate.com "ryan@corkyforsenate.com")**_ , and he will be sure to reach out and get you on the roster.

\- Corky
| |
---
**From** : Team Messner
**Sent** : Thursday, September 3, 2020 9:52 AM
**To** : All Supporters
**Subject** : Corky needs YOUR help!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0d78b52083e1559c/95dea7e3ea5c3c22c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Corky,

The countdown is on. We have just 5 days to go until the Republican primary for this must-win U.S. Senate seat.

Today, I’m writing to ask for your help. In these crucial days our hard-working volunteers will put us over the top!

**Before****Primary****Day, we need your help to make phone calls to potential Corky supporters**. This is crucial to our field strategy. With a close election, it's important we ensure that EVERY conservative knows exactly where Corky stands on the issues!

**On Primary Day, we need to show the world just how dedicated all of Corky's supporters are**. That's why we're recruiting volunteers to work the polls. In this role, you'll engage with fellow citizens still on the fence about their vote.

_We're also reminding voters that I have President Trump’s _“Complete and Total Endorsement”_ in this race. The President knows I have his back, and that I don’t back down from the tough fights_.

If you're able to volunteer (or have any questions), please email Team Messner's Field Director, **[Ryan Nichols (Ryan@CorkyForSenate.com)](mailto:ryan@corkyforsenate.com "ryan@corkyforsenate.com")**.
[ ](mailto:ryan@corkyforsenate.com)
Let’s fight with all we’ve got to WIN the primary on September 8th, and move on to defeat Jeanne Shaheen and the D.C. Democrat machine this November!

\- Team Messner

P.S. Even if you aren't able to volunteer, it's important that you VOTE for Corky! If you have questions about how and when to vote, [_**please visit our official election center**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0d78b52083e1559c/f5e2fdfc2959c631c3d6b838967d376c/33153).
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0d78b52083e1559c/4b9a364cd5e30de8c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0d78b52083e1559c/5cd0da494509b09dc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae2/53d9897e/55c47d18/1c8804a2/896214716/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

As Mark Warner continues to work hard to make life better for every Virginian, our team is committed to sending these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with what Mark is focused on.

**Here 's what Mark is working on right now:**
* **[Mark visited community leaders in Pulaski](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae2/53d9897e/55c47d18/1c8804a1/896214716/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.southwesttimes.com/2020/08/pulaski-gets-check-up-from-warner/")** during his community check-up tour, and talked with them about local redevelopment. Mark is working hard to make sure that communities in every corner of Virginia have the resources they need to make it through this difficult time.

* **[The Brady Campaign endorsed Mark for re-election.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae2/53d9897e/55c47d18/1c8804a0/896214716/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://elections.bradyunited.org/candidates/sen-mark-warner")** They praised him for being a champion for gun violence prevention in the Senate, and Mark is committed to creating actionable solutions to keep our country safer.

* Mark called Director of National Intelligence **[John Ratcliffe's decision to suspend in-person intelligence briefings](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae2/53d9897e/55c47d18/1c8804af/896214716/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://thehill.com/homenews/senate/514293-warner-calls-intelligence-chiefs-decision-to-scale-down-congressional")** "outrageous". Withholding these oversight briefings hampers Congress' ability to monitor foreign interference in our elections, and the American public has a right to know. Mark Warner will continue working to protect our elections and keep them free of foreign interference.

* Heading toward Election Day on November 3rd, we are facing a **[poll worker shortage](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae2/53d9897e/55c47d18/1c8804ae/896214716/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-offers-idea-to-address-poll-worker-shortage-lawyers/")**. To combat this, Mark is calling on states to allow lawyers to volunteer as poll workers on Election Day in exchange for Continuing Legal Education (CLE) credits.

* In Winchester, Mark called for another round of **[urgently needed coronavirus relief for the Northern Shenandoah Valley](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae2/53d9897e/55c47d18/1c8804ad/896214716/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.winchesterstar.com/coronavirus/warner-post-covid-economy-is-going-to-look-different/article_056eec4b-e995-5dd0-9c46-06a4cdf2f4a5.html")**. The pandemic has taken a toll on their economy, and Mark wants more assistance for the unemployed and small businesses.

* It's already September, which means that early voting in Virginia starts in just a few weeks. If you haven't already registered to vote, now is the perfect time to do so: **[www.iwillvote.com](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae2/53d9897e/55c47d18/1c8804ac/896214716/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "http://www.iwillvote.com")**.

Thank you for your continued support.

-- Team Warner
|

name: =?iso-8859-1?b?TWFy7WE=?= Teresa Kumar, votolatino.org
subject: Educate. Empower. Engage.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTO LATINO
body:
|
#
Peter, Thank you so much for joining the team here at Voto Latino! At a time when the Trump administration is hellbent on destroying our democracy, persecuting immigrants, and weakening voting rights, it’s never been more important for us to build a strong grassroots team ready to fight back. It’s hard to imagine an America without Latinxs. At Voto Latino, we fundamentally understand that we are the new builders and makers in this country. We’re focused on educating, empowering, and engaging young Latinxs all over the country to make a real difference in our communities. When Rosario Dawson first approached me about starting Voto Latino 15 years ago, people thought we were crazy! No one was speaking to young Latinxs, in English, using social media. But look where we are now. Latinxs are the second-largest voting bloc in this year’s election. Our votes will decide the election — that’s why we’re committed to registering one million new voters by Election Day this November. But our work doesn’t happen without you, Peter. name: Team Nehls
subject: Nehls News: Weekly Update from the Campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
**Nehls News
A Weekly Campaign Update
** _**We are Walking!**_

Interns and volunteers started walking doors last weekend! We are being COVID safe, wearing masks and stepping back from the door. If you would like to help you can sign up here:
**[https://www.nehlsforcongress.com/join-the-team](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/5216e47d1eb64dbd/58205a0a66b8830ec3d6b838967d376c/35193)**

_**Sunday Funday**_
Fort Bend County Republican candidates will be at Freedom Hall from 3 – 6 p.m. this Sunday, September 6th. It will be a great chance to meet the candidates. And, there will be Ice Cream!
Freedom Hall is located at 1612 Crabb River Road, Richmond, TX 77469

_**Nehls for Congress Coalitions**_
Congressional District 22 is one of the most diverse districts in the country. We are proud to have the support of many of those communities. Please visit our coalition pages on our website and sign up to be a member. **[Indo-Americans for Nehls](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/5216e47d1eb64dbd/9ccbbfb84f51528ac3d6b838967d376c/35193)** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/5216e47d1eb64dbd/43e23c0bbede838cc3d6b838967d376c/35193) **[Muslim-Americans for Nehls](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/5216e47d1eb64dbd/4494338e1389ce40c3d6b838967d376c/35193)** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/5216e47d1eb64dbd/9fb61ce2a8015d7cc3d6b838967d376c/35193) **[Asian Americans for Nehls](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/5216e47d1eb64dbd/7facd7671c8713dec3d6b838967d376c/35193)** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/5216e47d1eb64dbd/766d0847f9fd99bdc3d6b838967d376c/35193) _**Intern profile - Allyson Karaffa**_ I’m an Intern Supervisor for the campaign. I grew up in Fort Bend County. After graduating with my Masters from the University of Notre Dame, I decided to come back home to figure out what was next for me. The more I learned about Sheriff Nehls and his campaign, the more I wanted to vote for him. When I found out that he was looking to hire interns I knew that I wanted to work on his campaign. During my time with the campaign, I’ve been working on making phone calls, logging volunteer information, and setting up our Instagram account. It’s been a great way for me to learn more about the political process and watch what goes into a successful campaign.

I wouldn’t be a part of this campaign if I didn’t believe that Sheriff Nehls was the right candidate for Fort Bend County. This has been a great experience so far and I am excited for all our hard work to pay off in November. | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/5216e47d1eb64dbd/c98a0ca0f97c8496c3d6b838967d376c/35193) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/5216e47d1eb64dbd/1db152dd67c7532cc3d6b838967d376c/35193)
---|---
Paid for by Nehls for Congress

This email was sent by: Troy Nehls
1612 CRABB RIVER RD, RICHMOND, TX, 77469
[Profile Center](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694&c=35193&jid=5216e47d1eb64dbd)
[Unsubscribe](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694&c=35193&jid=5216e47d1eb64dbd)

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: The election is coming up. Are you registered to vote?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
The deadline to register to vote is one month away. We need to turn out as many voters as possible this November. | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

Election Day is coming up fast, and November 3rd will be here before you know it.

**The deadline to[register to vote](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=112575d13db74d6ebd6403429b573bf8&_e=fSUmJz7aT4u1vh1V9ut27cRLL_0cs8aUAq9UNvSOesBw0dlK98O3fUuz9LgLrZ3Bm-TOonPoWMZLc-REuastDuGHFNBUl_278xfynawA4ttdNB8QIJEr5tMJQUQD84W8kxawBgB3swYTher91ilCHhtK2yS2f83-BpnH8b8mdwg4ZRZ7aPQvvo94_d5CWrvFmAoJF142OYtViKYEREppyHiKvhVSYg1muAoAxCDbTYZeEtXK-jWCXTk-CXA3uYEyJLIGhXHj7mOw7AqU3EWyMkkw9utJAd9ty7KSC5L_CYFMA9XRhMGgofb-E_GE5xFu2ixDcnndb_noAWSPBKNN5VzbwaZ7i0O8n4PnjQjSudfuTpKLmDOmEb0jDJS9y2GN1UXRwn7mee-qUczsc8sTHFIWbiA08NALVl4aQYwmMnfIopBtMhwBO535kwrIAUGIUuJiDLVCkGJ64JFKka1RtQ%3D%3D) is just one month away. We need to turn out as many voters as possible in order to keep building One Indiana for ALL Hoosiers and it starts with your vote.**

It’s never been more important to make your voice heard. You only have **30 days left** to register or update your registration with any changes (move, name change, etc.).

Here’s how (you have some options):
* Check your registration now at this secure link: **[https://indianavoters.in.gov/](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=112575d13db74d6ebd6403429b573bf8&_e=fSUmJz7aT4u1vh1V9ut27cRLL_0cs8aUAq9UNvSOesBw0dlK98O3fUuz9LgLrZ3Bm-TOonPoWMZLc-REuastDuGHFNBUl_278xfynawA4ttdNB8QIJEr5tMJQUQD84W8kxawBgB3swYTher91ilCHhtK2yS2f83-BpnH8b8mdwg4ZRZ7aPQvvo94_d5CWrvFmAoJF142OYtViKYEREppyHiKvhVSYg1muAoAxCDbTYb5gzpLjWNKK1EH5yE4H41STc0vKn2ps00kIvPW8Ozc6K_U0Q8gib9B07Vv2Xn0MPFgy2YCV_1PCbbj8dayVuH5Y8aSQjdOofBE2AZY1ecaZ2AENM5cn-Q1KATTMjJjiTx_3e_rK-I0BIAq7T-aroZgNeJDQZay0g4OjR9hCTefWFGmKrnMWFFqgBmhZLcZ8cyxrgVDzXlA_S1jkdamgg2A2aTmAryEXjKBxT0P2huULA%3D%3D)**
* You can print the **[voter registration application](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=112575d13db74d6ebd6403429b573bf8&_e=fSUmJz7aT4u1vh1V9ut27URpbnIEbW_wKc-mArNORamf0r_uQ9SSdsmwe4zrmxfgFn414JXU44JzRfhkQQpf6RvQfeNeR7zUiYuPb_LLUON-3BCQIjyYZQoialFRhp9cYIGuXKEluuWU4O_Xq1hPqFxT0ZQwi-XnHR9u2R5WPLL2fOIl73yFKZctHefHAwqeta0AlyU6QraFBRtrVSzAE2-FM2wBqSuL85tFPqUBTp0LRDBPVUGqbsGNGtEYb_t4-gBn8OBGZz6lRhWNaiTrvSj-zWcRV843rSknLZP1X3bKwiR3LJ-2wcn0LFSydwk3TdBXzYSCjAZ5pFlXrsjxU1uW4Ej0T5elao_neE-LN0TYZHy5vrMojo7y4Q5uzFS4DPAp_ve9wQT-Mlo0N1mIPZrnB-H08b64RrASw5Y_DT4lw9n7Z3FC7Cu8sjtSuEGoAyzAVnWo9ujT4T3qHO6j_g%3D%3D)** and drop it off or mail it to your county clerk’s office.
* If you’d prefer, in-person registration is also **open** with measures taken for COVID-19 safety.

**The statewide deadline to register is Monday, October 5th. **

Thank you for registering to vote! We appreciate your help in ensuring that Governor Holcomb can continue to support Hoosiers like you.

Sincerely,

Your Holcomb Crew

disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | [**Republican SMEARS PBS in attempt to win Senate race**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b282/18e32a7f/4a422409/7b20f615/1897146631/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-broadcasting-surv?source=20200905_em_pet_b1_pbsavbrl_30_rs") [I'm absolutely disgusted. My Republican opponent just launched a despicable attack against PBS in order to win this Senate race. I will NOT allow Republicans like him to destroy our beloved public television. I need 50,000 signatures on my emergency petition to stand WITH PBS and STOP Republicans from destroying it. Can I count on you to sign before midnight? >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b282/18e32a7f/4a422409/7b20f615/1897146631/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-broadcasting-surv?source=20200905_em_pet_b1_pbsavbrl_30_rs") | My Republican opponent just launched a vile attack against PBS. [**I will NOT allow Republicans like him to slander PBS.**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b282/18e32a7f/4a422409/7b20f615/1897146631/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-broadcasting-surv?source=20200905_em_pet_b1_pbsavbrl_30_rs")
[**_BEFORE MIDNIGHT: I need 50,000 signatures on my emergency petition to STOP Republicans from destroying PBS. Millions are relying on public television for accurate reporting during this pandemic. I will NOT let my Republican opponent sabotage our access to this critical, life-saving information. Will you sign my emergency petition to PROTECT PBS? >>_**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b282/18e32a7f/4a422409/7b20f615/1897146631/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-broadcasting-surv?source=20200905_em_pet_b1_pbsavbrl_30_rs")

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b282/18e32a7f/4a422409/7b20f60e/1897146631/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b282/18e32a7f/4a422409/7b20f60f/1897146631/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b282/18e32a7f/4a422409/7b20f60c/1897146631/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b282/18e32a7f/4a422409/7b20f608/1897146631/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b282/18e32a7f/4a422409/7b20f60a/1897146631/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. name: Lauren Boebert For Congress
subject: WE ARE FIGHTING FOR FREEDOM!
body:
The Democrats are trying to buy my district, but we're not going to let it happen!
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q-Ams9bAyLHvA4dpiOycxQ9znmreKYundy4wG_TEBoM7IRqouvk46CBnIQEBC1tmeXcqNz_01tB3LmNbVHI2C02LdMeHeTyY5qSYvK_5k_fTjtYq5PWPcpS6iimTQ7JIx-wOkV-VxLbOZg9Lhc_GFyxl3hFG_ftyly-UEsrG5riUx0Z0LT0eOnBo0n_Oa7aHT4lY1_eN-ojjXI5aUCvowRUtMtj6EudJU32tgwKdUKrogy4UKlchuFPZxXuvw08tXanqsX6DCBbbWckDGkmTJR5aNWuD-GvAbmlJ4SgNp9c0kz7r5LDczVEe6WVsjwFPYDFgAZdd2SD1sYeqU-5uFQ==&c=zkgemMa5J4RXCS1QAiEQXqXmnNz1Qfc-a4ZgtQ4FIaNnyZ4iRt7t1g==&ch=xe8lHTTLy9B5oYmBQ_bmfYdKkOryd9KEFtt4QnVlr38mqKXsh9S52g==)
---
|
---
| Hello Patriots,
My name is Lauren Boebert and I'm running for Congress in Colorado's 3rd District. You may have seen me in the news, as my campaign made major headlines for defeating a five-term incumbent. We shocked the political world because we beat the establishment. Since then, it's been a nonstop barrage of attacks.
I'm not a politician, I'm a patriot fed up with seeing far-left politicians like AOC and her Socialist Squad take over the country. I'm a small business owner, and most importantly a mother of four children.
The radical Democrats are pouring cash into my rural district to try and get their hand-picked socialist into office. They're fighting me tooth and nail because they know I will be a steadfast ally to President Trump and call them out as they try to denigrate and destroy our Constitutional rights.
That's why I need your help. My opponent just threw nearly $2 million of her special interest money into TV ads.
[We NEED to level the playing field out and get OUR message on TV. I need you to donate $10, $25 or more today to help my campaign defeat these radical socialists and keep our district solidly red.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q-Ams9bAyLHvA4dpiOycxQ9znmreKYundy4wG_TEBoM7IRqouvk46CBnIQEBC1tmeXcqNz_01tB3LmNbVHI2C02LdMeHeTyY5qSYvK_5k_fTjtYq5PWPcpS6iimTQ7JIx-wOkV-VxLbOZg9Lhc_GFyxl3hFG_ftyly-UEsrG5riUx0Z0LT0eOnBo0n_Oa7aHT4lY1_eN-ojjXI5aUCvowRUtMtj6EudJU32tgwKdUKrogy4UKlchuFPZxXuvw08tXanqsX6DCBbbWckDGkmTJR5aNWuD-GvAbmlJ4SgNp9c0kz7r5LDczVEe6WVsjwFPYDFgAZdd2SD1sYeqU-5uFQ==&c=zkgemMa5J4RXCS1QAiEQXqXmnNz1Qfc-a4ZgtQ4FIaNnyZ4iRt7t1g==&ch=xe8lHTTLy9B5oYmBQ_bmfYdKkOryd9KEFtt4QnVlr38mqKXsh9S52g==)
Help me flip the House for President Trump! We are a historically red district, but the Democrats are fighting me like they've never fought before. I need your help!
---
| Lauren Boebert
---
| |
---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q-Ams9bAyLHvA4dpiOycxQ9znmreKYundy4wG_TEBoM7IRqouvk46CBnIQEBC1tmeXcqNz_01tB3LmNbVHI2C02LdMeHeTyY5qSYvK_5k_fTjtYq5PWPcpS6iimTQ7JIx-wOkV-VxLbOZg9Lhc_GFyxl3hFG_ftyly-UEsrG5riUx0Z0LT0eOnBo0n_Oa7aHT4lY1_eN-ojjXI5aUCvowRUtMtj6EudJU32tgwKdUKrogy4UKlchuFPZxXuvw08tXanqsX6DCBbbWckDGkmTJR5aNWuD-GvAbmlJ4SgNp9c0kz7r5LDczVEe6WVsjwFPYDFgAZdd2SD1sYeqU-5uFQ==&c=zkgemMa5J4RXCS1QAiEQXqXmnNz1Qfc-a4ZgtQ4FIaNnyZ4iRt7t1g==&ch=xe8lHTTLy9B5oYmBQ_bmfYdKkOryd9KEFtt4QnVlr38mqKXsh9S52g==)

clean_body: | = | | Team, money can’t buy you an election ― but it does help you share your message with the people of your district. And right now we’re getting drowned out. = This race is hard enough running against a deeply-entrenched career politician who cozies up to corporations and the most powerful among us. But we’re facing a big fundraising gap and millions more that Washington Republicans have pledged to spend to STOP our momentum. They have big-dollar bankrollers ― but we have YOU. Heading into the final two months of this election, we need your help now more than ever. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = It’s not just the amount of money McCaul pulls in ― it’s also how he does it. Over 41% of our contributions are from small-dollar donors. ONLY 8% of McCaul’s millions are. McCaul doesn’t fight for you, he fights for his rich friends, and they pay him in kind. If we want to see real change happen in Washington, it has to happen from the bottom-up, and it starts with electing people like Mike to Congress. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for your support! name: Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
subject: We can't win the most important election of our lifetime without your support.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Every day we're working our hearts out to win this race. |
---
Peter, it's Joe and Kamala.

[There are just 59 days left before Election Day, and we're counting on our top supporters to pitch in $25 to power us through the final two months of this race »](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.05_B1_JRBKDHgif_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.05_B1_JRBKDHgif_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.05_B1_JRBKDHgif_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.05_B1_JRBKDHgif_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

[DONATE $25](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.05_B1_JRBKDHgif_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.05_B1_JRBKDHgif_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
Every day we're working our hearts out to win this race.

Giving speeches to counter Trump's divisive rhetoric, media interviews to get in front of voters in states that will decide the Electoral College result, and doing our best to make sure that the campaign has the resources to get our message out.

But, the truth is, we can't win the most important election of our lifetime without your support. **Unlike Donald Trump, 95% of our campaign 's contributions come from grassroots donors just like you, donating online, and reading emails like this one.**

That's why we're taking the time to send an email from the both of us today.

September is the most important month of this campaign to-date, and we can't afford to fall short. Not now. We have incredible momentum coming out of August, but we can't take anything for granted, so our fundraising only needs to increase from here on out.

[So, Peter, if you're able to join us, will you chip in your first $25 of September to help us win the battle for the soul of the nation? Every contribution counts and no donation is too small to have an impact.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.05_B1_JRBKDHgif_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.05_B1_JRBKDHgif_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1f6/1cd0ac28/15a9119a1/35702b06/1958906394/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1f6/1cd0ac28/15a9119a1/35702b05/1958906394/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1f6/1cd0ac28/15a9119a1/35702b08/1958906394/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1f6/1cd0ac28/15a9119a1/35702b04/1958906394/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1f6/1cd0ac28/15a9119a1/35702b07/1958906394/VEsEAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1f6/1cd0ac28/15a9119a1/35702b03/1958906394/VEsEDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

Giving speeches to counter Trump's divisive rhetoric, media interviews to get in front of voters in states that will decide the Electoral College result, and doing our best to make sure that the campaign has the resources to get our message out. But, the truth is, we can't win the most important election of our lifetime without your support. Unlike Donald Trump, 95% of our campaign 's contributions come from grassroots donors just like you, donating online, and reading emails like this one. That's why we're taking the time to send an email from the both of us today. September is the most important month of this campaign to-date, and we can't afford to fall short. Not now. body:
November 3rd won’t be a run-of-the-mill trip to the ballot box. Our votes this year could change the course of history, and Darin needs you | |
---
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=174a5593e99e4e03bb621f7133fdc487&_e=AKBZOEBn74ilDiRGSIfUBiZKjjfCTHbLgUYxTRuGGolvUEcu4oBOMuJ0bQQ3wtbKYKcP0_JU43TxwC1fmWhfu1Q-JPKDoo7Uc4DDUeeGXvek_L6fkjTT-V7-i_xXsYrdU8XYP_UkhSzfxgisoEL_gfiOqnZjj9qs_imia-83dxFabrhRsQUe_QSU-hA55POKVoV7onCcEvLoAr2ovsAzs8Eb1GpxdV-2pxCTntl-PGUmqE0wIyEIHswNe2vkQG3TyzZSiuKBdRj9pyDgnfRWNqmm2qyGy-7uJ5xueDhkifSRnrxqne65mYJikNf_Gi3HFzSVlk80eFUYhDkjBSI5mzbfDASEgHNBXC75OlE-vvPUXbUVE2nYTCzyNVCOMCjzJ5YGqf19ahNfDbxvGBYvsCP31BsZd3Hx2ZuH_nHjV7m2av3tiHwWqpFNEh-gcE9wb6s_izf-n2G1yoaurqCeJfuAJ0GCJaKkQG2EdpEy2jM%3D)
|

Friend,

We’re sure that you know by now that November’s elections won’t be a run-of-the-mill trip to the ballot box.

The votes that we’ll be casting this year are carrying extra weight – and with everything that’s at stake in this election, **our votes could change the course of history.**

_That’s exactly the message that Darin has in his latest video – and with Illinois early voting starting in just**three weeks,** he needs you to see this._
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=174a5593e99e4e03bb621f7133fdc487&_e=AKBZOEBn74ilDiRGSIfUBiZKjjfCTHbLgUYxTRuGGolvUEcu4oBOMuJ0bQQ3wtbKYKcP0_JU43TxwC1fmWhfu1Q-JPKDoo7Uc4DDUeeGXvek_L6fkjTT-V7-i_xXsYrdU8XYP_UkhSzfxgisoEL_gfiOqnZjj9qs_imia-83dxFabrhRsQUe_QSU-hA55POKVoV7onCcEvLoAr2ovsAzs8Eb1GpxdV-2pxCTntl-PGUmqE0wIyEIHswNe2vkQG3TyzZSiuKBdRj9pyDgnfRWNiWiRTumfrMq9xWv6t2vmwRheRpZPikNMFdvFpa3lCjX1zAy6-Or5H3TvV4fjsMnPjC0LdQDfBrI3Sn7dZ9JId7tgpZrBD5Tm-35kw3fu2-G3zIDhEUFvNnSVfERpJChLTABBfRKXJuZP33piD4BG7tXdAh-PP1z0YtgLOjysG40pZqe4miguaHbDDhcVAQQf133Mokp-srTIsFADuOX-V4%3D)
[**WATCH THE FULL VIDEO AND CHIP IN TO SUPPORT DARIN**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=174a5593e99e4e03bb621f7133fdc487&_e=AKBZOEBn74ilDiRGSIfUBiZKjjfCTHbLgUYxTRuGGolvUEcu4oBOMuJ0bQQ3wtbKYKcP0_JU43TxwC1fmWhfu1Q-JPKDoo7Uc4DDUeeGXvek_L6fkjTT-V7-i_xXsYrdU8XYP_UkhSzfxgisoEL_gfiOqnZjj9qs_imia-83dxFabrhRsQUe_QSU-hA55POKVoV7onCcEvLoAr2ovsAzs8Eb1GpxdV-2pxCTntl-PGUmqE0wIyEIHswNe2vkQG3TyzZSiuKBdRj9pyDgnfRWNh8M2x9YilTI_dcXdQSjyaxQ3a6c4MfKipDYMXxlfIW84uQvrOwUIpy03DUYDVH_tRWbaUPRRgjUdFJiOfyLtqVt00JtZkLhTgBaJrkJ1Dcdi6OZZcprQw1pebWpCqYwOBwNq3FAlIJNSVK3k-bHNa62f9_c12XhKUfY0fEcSpNYrKwYF3hmdVONkCcK-DgaPEjN6npf3M41BbUslm6rGD4%3D)
**_Will we elect leaders who stand up to the Chinese Communist Party – or ones who bow down to them?_**

**_Will we take back Congress from Nancy Pelosi – or let her decades-long rule continue for another two years?_**

**_Will we elect principled, honest, conservative leaders – or let the Pritzker-Madigan machine continue to wreak havoc on Illinois?_**

Those are the decisions that are on voters’ shoulders this year, and we can’t sit back and hope that they take care of themselves.

It’s time to stand up and defend conservative leadership.

_**Are you in?**_
[**CHIP IN TO DEFEND CONSERVATIVE LEADERSHIP**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=174a5593e99e4e03bb621f7133fdc487&_e=AKBZOEBn74ilDiRGSIfUBiZKjjfCTHbLgUYxTRuGGolvUEcu4oBOMuJ0bQQ3wtbKYKcP0_JU43TxwC1fmWhfu1Q-JPKDoo7Uc4DDUeeGXvek_L6fkjTT-V7-i_xXsYrdU8XYP_UkhSzfxgisoEL_gfiOqnZjj9qs_imia-83dxFabrhRsQUe_QSU-hA55POKVoV7onCcEvLoAr2ovsAzs8Eb1GpxdV-2pxCTntl-PGUmqE0wIyEIHswNe2vkQG3TyzZSiuKBdRj9pyDgnfRWNnqTHR84SHj1DbONlQMt0hW74OmJzvXae0eiV7Ni0DWdDs-Pj5E4pn5FEleCIAgeEmpkC6P_VogVS394E-W5K8r4QOfyNV5qi3nTqkw-Ic4oMje31_S4AEaLaGX_NCF9aTQDtHfU9GghZ2_N8FmwrYMPgOD72jfXOmNULDgXAcdmB2sNi3AnEw9THXCxdKs2cXsc7lXW1ZbXn7HNhte2LSE%3D)
Thank you,
Team LaHood

name: Christy Smith
subject: $5 from a retired schoolteacher, $40 from a union electrician
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | **$22.44.**

That's the average grassroots contribution to our campaign, Peter.

That's $5 here from a retired schoolteacher and $40 there from a union electrician.

It's folks like you giving a little bit when they can -- despite these tough times.

It's the kind of donation that makes this team so strong.

**Unlike our opponent, we don't take money from corporate PACs or D.C. lobbyists** \-- big money special interests who can write a check and donate thousands of dollars at the drop of a hat and expect something back in return. Now, that rule of ours can make fundraising harder, but it's the right way to win this race.

Our grassroots donors are truly the power behind this movement, and I'm so grateful to have so many of you with me in the fight to elect a _real_ leader for CA-25 -- someone who represents the people, not powerful party leaders.

**[Peter, a new poll shows us _just one point_ behind our opponent. We have the people behind us, and we _know_ we can win. Chip in $5 or more right now to help this team pull ahead.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc50/29776869/942ea30/569e435e/2693414434/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MDVfRU9NOHJlc2VuZF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200905_EOM8resend_in")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc50/29776869/942ea30/569e435f/2693414434/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MDVfRU9NOHJlc2VuZF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200905_EOM8resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $22.44](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc50/29776869/942ea30/569e4358/2693414434/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MDVfRU9NOHJlc2VuZF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200905_EOM8resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=22.44")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc50/29776869/942ea30/569e4359/2693414434/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MDVfRU9NOHJlc2VuZF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200905_EOM8resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc50/29776869/942ea30/569e435a/2693414434/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MDVfRU9NOHJlc2VuZF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200905_EOM8resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc50/29776869/942ea30/569e435b/2693414434/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MDVfRU9NOHJlc2VuZF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200905_EOM8resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc50/29776869/942ea30/569e435e/2693414434/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MDVfRU9NOHJlc2VuZF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200905_EOM8resend_in")
I want the folks of our district to know that my vote isn't for sale -- and that I don't believe that _anyone_ should be able to buy their way into Congress thanks to corporate PAC money.

I'm proud that this is the way we're running our campaign, Peter, and I know we can win in November. After all, there now are 30,000 more registered Democrats in this district than Republicans, and each and every one of them is ready to turn CA-25 blue.

But our opponent has special-interest donors on his side -- like the NRCC, which just dumped **more than $800,000** into this district to prop up his campaign. If we're going to fight back, this grassroots team needs your support now to take on anything that comes our way -- and turn the momentum we have built into a win on Election Day.

**[Please, click here to make a contribution of $5 -- or $22.44! -- today.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc50/29776869/942ea30/569e435e/2693414434/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MDVfRU9NOHJlc2VuZF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200905_EOM8resend_in")**

Thank you,

Christy

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc50/29776869/942ea30/569e435e/2693414434/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MDVfRU9NOHJlc2VuZF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200905_EOM8resend_in")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc50/29776869/942ea30/569e435e/2693414434/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MDVfRU9NOHJlc2VuZF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200905_EOM8resend_in")
---

---|---
|

PO Box 301, 24307 Magic Mountain Pkwy, Valencia, CA 91355.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc50/29776869/942ea30/569e4355/2693414434/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc50/29776869/942ea30/569e4356/2693414434/VEsHBg/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Join us in making history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Exciting news, Friend!

We’re teaming up with more awesome Democratic Texas State House candidates
who are ready to fight for ALL of us in Austin! Like Beto said, we have
two important tasks to complete this November: Win a Democratic majority
in the Texas House AND win Texas’ electoral college votes for Joe Biden.

They’re both important. And if we work together, we can accomplish them
both. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42547?t=1001&akid=104037%2E444211%2E8qsMtn ]Sign up to phone bank for (and with!) these great 8 local
candidates next week.

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43037?source=ema20200905-104037&t=1002&akid=104037%2E444211%2E8qsMtn ]Virtual Phone Bank with state house candidates and Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43037?source=ema20200905-104037&t=1003&akid=104037%2E444211%2E8qsMtn ]Thursday, September 10, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43037?source=ema20200905-104037&t=1004&akid=104037%2E444211%2E8qsMtn ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43038?source=ema20200905-104037&t=1005&akid=104037%2E444211%2E8qsMtn ]Virtual Phone Bank with state house candidates and Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43038?source=ema20200905-104037&t=1006&akid=104037%2E444211%2E8qsMtn ]Monday, September 14, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43038?source=ema20200905-104037&t=1007&akid=104037%2E444211%2E8qsMtn ]Get more info or RSVP »

Even if you’re never volunteered with us before – or volunteered in
general – it’s not too late to step in and make a difference. We’ll teach
you exactly what to do, what to say, and show you the difference you’re
making, all with Beto and these local candidates by your (virtual) side.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42547?t=1008&akid=104037%2E444211%2E8qsMtn ]Join us in making history!

See you on the dialer,

Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1009&akid=104037%2E444211%2E8qsMtn

And if we work together, we can accomplish them both. [ ]Sign up to phone bank for (and with!) these great 8 local candidates next week. Upcoming events: [ ]Virtual Phone Bank with state house candidates and Beto [ ]Thursday, September 10, 6:30 pm CT [ ]Get more info or RSVP » [ ]Virtual Phone Bank with state house candidates and Beto [ ]Monday, September 14, 6:30 pm CT [ ]Get more info or RSVP » Even if you’re never volunteered with us before – or volunteered in general – it’s not too late to step in and make a difference. We’ll teach you exactly what to do, what to say, and show you the difference you’re making, all with Beto and these local candidates by your (virtual) side. [ ]Join us in making history! See you on the dialer, Powered by People

name: Monthly Newsletter -- via Team Rita
subject: Rita Review [September Edition]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/dxxTPUbMV9Zlk60Hjxs0kAOzQvglwXpNLGySsVAoyeE=/IXdq0Q7KPaTmW4Bx5ex1JxoyOYMFWefO4th70T959m8=?refcode=200905-email) _Welcome to the September edition of The Rita Review! August gave us a preview of what this race will look like in the next two months leading up to Election Day, so we have a lot of news to share with all of you._ **Iowa Derecho Storms** August 10th was a disastrous day for many of us in eastern Iowa. Rita's farm sustained some serious damage. Thankfully, everyone in our family and on our team was unhurt. Here's a list of organizations across eastern Iowa helping people get through this difficult time. Quad Cities Community Foundation: **[https://qccf.fcsuite.com/erp/donate](https://act.myngp.com/el/dxxTPUbMV9Zlk60Hjxs0kAOzQvglwXpNLGySsVAoyeE=/yqNQH6U2kpHmR6ZEFbrm2ji6baCLNQIAVjLFdDbRtpw=)** United Way of Johnson and Washington County: **[https://www.unitedwayjwc.org/](https://act.myngp.com/el/dxxTPUbMV9Zlk60Hjxs0kAOzQvglwXpNLGySsVAoyeE=/-yOCKi2Do-FZKPbciWk_uTTnHLLpMxdFw-cKYCreUSw=)** United Way of Clinton County: **[https://www.clintonunitedway.org/civicrm/contribute/transact?reset=1&id=2](https://act.myngp.com/el/dxxTPUbMV9Zlk60Hjxs0kAOzQvglwXpNLGySsVAoyeE=/Y_wCUG7LIplTSOpMARRxPZaFmv2Z5tRGVP889ge0hB4=?reset=1&id=2)** United Way of Jasper County: **[https://secure.qgiv.com/for/uwojccd/mobile](https://act.myngp.com/el/dxxTPUbMV9Zlk60Hjxs0kAOzQvglwXpNLGySsVAoyeE=/XISOrNUyjl9lUpRdRO1K-nCbqYoCqq46yMgdNtTWSlY=)**
**New Television Ads!**
We took a big step in this campaign, and are so excited to share with you Rita's first two ads!
Check them out here, and share them with your friends.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dxxTPUbMV9Zlk60Hjxs0kAOzQvglwXpNLGySsVAoyeE=/KcFCvNwU_h572aE_nuh3OadjFVZLf265wpBCPdooAqI=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dxxTPUbMV9Zlk60Hjxs0kAOzQvglwXpNLGySsVAoyeE=/qeOkg2dbpUCFLySjWQu0vKeAifArRfsgvWzg7WCMDFU=)
**Endorsement from President Obama**
At the beginning of the month, Rita received a very encouraging endorsement from President Barack Obama. We're honored that President Obama is just as invested in seeing Rita win IA-02 as we are!
**Yard Signs!**
Yard signs are here! Let your community know you're on Team Hart by requesting a yard sign. We have a limited supply, so get your request in early! Let's make sure there's a sea of Rita Hart signs across IA-02!
__**[Request a Yard Sign](https://act.myngp.com/el/dxxTPUbMV9Zlk60Hjxs0kAOzQvglwXpNLGySsVAoyeE=/YXAqtHVefK9nWIlUwDTz4Gx5XVlg6fMaiMiMe6EMaDE=)**__
---
**Reaching Voters**
Rita has been calling voters across the district most evenings. Monday, she spoke with John, a former Republican and newly registered Democrat. John is a doctor and worried about the GOP repealing the Affordable Care Act without a replacement. Health care is personal for so many Iowans. We need to protect our care.
If you want to help us reach voters, sign up here: [https://www.mobilize.us/hartforcongress/](https://act.myngp.com/el/dxxTPUbMV9Zlk60Hjxs0kAOzQvglwXpNLGySsVAoyeE=/68abzJY0SAPE4keGedIAUTnKOX7nP49kwUi_MMArjAo=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dxxTPUbMV9Zlk60Hjxs0kAOzQvglwXpNLGySsVAoyeE=/68abzJY0SAPE4keGedIAUTnKOX7nP49kwUi_MMArjAo=)
**Rita Hart campaigns for Congress in the age of COVID-19**
If you want to bring people together to:
1. tackle corruption and ban members of Congress from becoming lobbyists
2. lower the costs of health care and prescription drugs
3. invest in education so we can bring back jobs

We want you on this team!
Read about it here: [https://www.desmoinesregister.com/picture-gallery/news/politics/elections/2020/08/06/rita-hart-campaigns-age-coronavirus-congress-politics-covid-iowa/3301549001/?fbclid=IwAR3mLRSLSThzRjIIrCfsfnN0LU_AkINqP8Gi9kJUqWWB8ccVCPHkyzCsios](https://act.myngp.com/el/dxxTPUbMV9Zlk60Hjxs0kAOzQvglwXpNLGySsVAoyeE=/nKuCBY8ZC84hIJuImD4fHGoDz1znk-LdM7DN_NeRusM=?fbclid=IwAR3mLRSLSThzRjIIrCfsfnN0LU_AkINqP8Gi9kJUqWWB8ccVCPHkyzCsios)
**First day of school**
Rita spent 20 years teaching in small, rural schools. She is thinking of all the students, parents, support staff and teachers starting a new year.
Thank you to all the schools and teachers who are doing everything to keep themselves, their students and their colleagues safe. Thank you!
**Humble Roots, Mother 's Teachings Guide Rita Hart's Campaign For Congress -- Iowa Starting Line**
"I think it's so important right now, as people are really struggling through this COVID crisis, that people are kind of hungry for positive feelings. I'm hungry for it. I want to rejoice and see some wholesomeness, some positive notion that the sun is still coming up in the morning and that we still value the basic things of what we really care about in this world."
Read the rest of Rita's story [ here!](https://act.myngp.com/el/dxxTPUbMV9Zlk60Hjxs0kAOzQvglwXpNLGySsVAoyeE=/UHjf4l7F2SWaSHUPrs29Mc00GPYgTKMD13fs6VfAin4=?fbclid=IwAR1JaoA7fBMRHp8lO_ZQKuuB8w3gPR6drvAYlyLvJxpCUcGGs-y6fzLXQ_o)
_That 's it for the latest edition of the Rita Review. We're continuing to listen to the stories of every single person in Iowa's 2nd District, and we couldn't do it without your help. The best part about campaigning is being able to engage in our community, and it's thanks to supporters like you that we can keep doing so._
_\- Team Rita_
____**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/dxxTPUbMV9Zlk60Hjxs0kAOzQvglwXpNLGySsVAoyeE=/IXdq0Q7KPaTmW4Bx5ex1JxoyOYMFWefO4th70T959m8=?refcode=200905-email)**____
---

I want to rejoice and see some wholesomeness, some positive notion that the sun is still coming up in the morning and that we still value the basic things of what we really care about in this world." Read the rest of Rita's story That 's it for the latest edition of the Rita Review. We're continuing to listen to the stories of every single person in Iowa's 2nd District, and we couldn't do it without your help. The best part about campaigning is being able to engage in our community, and it's thanks to supporters like you that we can keep doing so. \- Team Rita __ Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa Rita Hart for Iowa P.O. Box 333 Wheatland IA 52777 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please=.__ __

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e832/77d4c309/21ad03d9/2635e518/3916479699/VEsEBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign.
