name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: Peter, I'm hoping to get your thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I'm hoping when I get the next list of respondents to this strategy survey, I'll see your name on there. |
---
Peter, it's Joe. I hope this email finds you well.

We're just 59 days away from Election Day, and boy has time moved quickly. It feels like just yesterday we launched this battle for the soul of the nation, and now we're in the home stretch.

Our team is finalizing our plans for the rest of the fall, everything from our advertising plans to our organizing plans and more. But, since we began this campaign, we've always made our biggest decisions with the help of the folks who power this campaign, and that includes you.

[That's why I asked my team to pull a list of everyone who has responded to our Fall Strategy Survey. But, Peter, I didn't see your name on that list. Can you add your response right now?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/35703558/2685775762/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/fall-campaign-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full") | [YES, I'LL TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/35703558/2685775762/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/fall-campaign-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full")
---
These decisions that we make as a team will have an enormous impact on the results we wake up to on November 4th, and we can't have any regrets.

So this survey is too important to not respond to today, and I'm hoping when I get the next list of respondents to this strategy survey, I'll see your name on there, Peter.

[Please, add your response and weigh in on our fall plans. It will only take a few minutes of your time, I promise:](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/35703558/2685775762/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/fall-campaign-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full")
[YES, I'LL TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/35703558/2685775762/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/fall-campaign-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full")
---
Thank you for all you do,

Joseph R. Biden Jr.
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/35703557/2685775762/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/35703556/2685775762/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/35703555/2685775762/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/35703554/2685775762/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/35703553/2685775762/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/35703552/2685775762/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/35703551/2685775762/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/35703550/2685775762/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/3570354f/2685775762/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/3570354e/2685775762/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/35703551/2685775762/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/3570354d/2685775762/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/35703550/2685775762/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20f/1cd0ac28/15af7703e/3570354c/2685775762/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Please, Help General Don Bolduc Win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
With the growing riots our streets and the continued rise of China, having Don join me in the U.S. Senate will be one of the best things we can do for our country. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzODc4OTIS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDQ5MzM0MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

My friend General Don Bolduc has spent his life serving his country. He fought terrorists in Afghanistan, helped lead our counter-terrorism strategy, and he’s as tough on China as anyone I know.

That’s why I support Don Bolduc for Senate—because he can win, and when he does, I’ll have someone who will fight with me against the liberal mob and against China.
Early on, I saw Don’s conviction and dedication to serve New Hampshire. And if Don wins, we’ll replace a liberal Democrat with a conservative Republican.

There has never been a more critical time to support his campaign than right now. Don’s election is just days away on Sept. 8 and every dollar donated between now and then means one more flyer passed out, one more door knocked on, or one more phone call made for Don.

With the growing riots our streets and the continued rise of China, having Don join me in the U.S. Senate will be one of the best things we can do for our country. Please support his campaign by donating at this link. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzODc4OTIS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDQ5MzM0MwS2&mt=1&rt=0

Let’s bring another strong conservative to Washington, DC.
